2021-22 San Diego Toreros Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 15-16 (7-9, 7th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Sam Scholl

PS/G: 65.8 (307th of 358)

PA/G: 67.3 (124th of 358)

SRS: -3.32 (203rd of 358)

SOS: 1.48 (118th of 358)

ORtg: 96.9 (303rd of 358)

DRtg: 99.0 (140th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
